name: Grade 8 Geography — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 8 pathway for sustainability, climate, migration, spatial argument, and research. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 8 knowledge and transferable skills in sustainability, climate, migration, spatial argument, and research.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
